lp.hero_subtitle: AI-powered bilingual knowledge base for Google Developer Groups on Campus Japan
lp.feature_ingest_desc: Import from Google Docs and let Gemini AI structure and translate your content automatically.
lp.feature_bilingual_desc: Every page is maintained in both Japanese and English with AI-assisted translation.
lp.feature_kb_desc: Organize your chapter's activities, events, and resources in a searchable wiki.
lp.feature_members_desc: Invite members, assign roles, and manage access across multiple chapters.
lp.how_step1_desc: Paste text or a Google Doc link. Our AI reads and understands your content.
lp.how_step2_desc: Gemini structures bilingual wiki pages and suggests tags automatically.
lp.how_step3_desc: Review the draft, make edits, and publish to your chapter's knowledge base.
lp.signin_modal_title: Sign in to GDGoC Japan Wiki
lp.signin_modal_subtitle: Access is for GDGoC Japan chapter members only.
lp.features_subtitle: A purpose-built wiki for Google Developer Groups on Campus Japan chapters.
lp.how_subtitle: From raw notes to a polished bilingual wiki page in minutes.
lp.cta_subtitle: Join GDGoC Japan's shared knowledge base and keep your chapter's know-how organized.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: When you sign in with Google OAuth, we receive and store your name, email address, and profile photo URL as provided by Google. We also store content you create or upload on the wiki, along with metadata such as creation timestamps and authorship.
privacy.s2_body: Your data is used solely to operate the GDGoC Japan Wiki: authenticating your identity, attributing wiki content to your account, and managing chapter membership. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s3_intro: This service uses the following third-party providers:
privacy.s3_google: for authentication. Subject to <googlePolicy>Google's Privacy Policy</googlePolicy>.
privacy.s3_cloudflare: for hosting, database (D1), and object storage (R2). Subject to <cloudflarePolicy>Cloudflare's Privacy Policy</cloudflarePolicy>.
privacy.s3_gemini: for AI-assisted content generation. Uploaded content may be processed by Google's AI services.
privacy.s4_body: Your account data is retained while your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting a wiki administrator.
privacy.s5_body: For privacy-related questions, please contact your chapter lead or the GDGoC Japan wiki administrators via the wiki's GitHub repository.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: The GDGoC Japan Wiki is an internal knowledge-sharing platform for GDGoC Japan chapter members. Access is granted at the discretion of chapter leads and administrators. Use of this service is subject to the GDGoC Community Guidelines.
terms.s2_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your Google account used to sign in. You must not share your access credentials or allow unauthorized individuals to use the wiki through your account.
terms.s3_body: You retain ownership of content you create on the wiki. By posting content, you grant GDGoC Japan a non-exclusive license to store, display, and share that content with other authorized wiki members. Wiki content is intended for internal chapter use.
terms.s4_item1: Posting content that is illegal, harassing, or violates others' privacy
terms.s4_item2: Sharing confidential chapter information with unauthorized parties
terms.s4_item3: Attempting to circumvent access controls or security measures
terms.s4_item4: Using the wiki or its AI features for purposes unrelated to GDGoC activities
terms.s5_body: The wiki is provided "as is" for internal GDGoC Japan use. AI-generated content may contain errors and should be reviewed before publication. We make no warranties regarding uptime, data preservation, or accuracy of AI-assisted features.
terms.s6_body: These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use of the wiki after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
